title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 7–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Straw Hat Pirates, Luffy, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We won't be able to dodge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can't let them wipe us out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Impressive, they managed to get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is it because it would hurt?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 22 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
